markdown:
#  Generate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
#####  Procore Pay Integrates with the Modernized Subcontractor Invoicing Experience
in Procore Pay, lien wavers are powered by Levelset, a Procore Company. To manage lien waivers with the Invoice Management tools in Procore, your Procore users must be using the modernized subcontractor invoicing experience.
##  Background 
When using the lien waiver features with Procore Pay, any user with access to a subcontractor invoice can generate new lien waivers. This action creates the required lien waivers for the invoice using the default template set in the project's Invoicing tool's Settings page.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


#####  Important
**If your company is paying subcontractor invoices with Procore Pay.** The Procore + DocuSign© integration exclusively collects signatures for invoices. It does not collect signatures for an invoice's Lien Waiver. To collect lien waiver signatures with Procore's Invoice Management tools, your company must [Enable Procore Pay as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-procore-pay). For more guidance, see [Sign Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-lien-waivers).
##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Lien Waiver Templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/create-lien-waiver-templates)
  * [Enable Lien Waivers in the Company Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers)
  * [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects)
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Create a new invoice or open an existing invoice on a Procore project.   
See [About Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/about-subcontractor-invoices). 
  2. In the invoice, scroll down to the **Lien Waivers** card.  
Procore Pay automatically generates the appropriate lien waiver(s) and shows the date on the Lien Waivers card. New lien waivers are automatically placed in the _Pending Signature_ status.  
  
![Lien Waivers Pending Signature](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/32bb01230b52e1cc7e185c78ee225f3b/69beb66d84476ce6d0ded21d0c6dcb5e/lien-waivers-pending-signature.png?fm=webp)
#####  Tips
     * **How does Procore know what kind of lien waiver(s) to generate?** First, your company's Payments Admin follows the steps in [Create Lien Waiver Templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/create-lien-waiver-templates) and [Enable Lien Waivers in the Company Payments ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers)[Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers). Next, an invoice administrator on your project follows the steps in [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects). The project must have a 'State' selected in the Project level Admin tool on the General tab in the [Project Location](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/update-general-project-information) section. It must also match the 'State' defined in the project's default template.
     * **Don't see a Lien Waivers card on the invoice?** A Payments Admin must [Enable Lien Waivers in the Company Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-lien-waivers). In addition, an invoice administrator must complete the steps in [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects). Once enabled, the **Generate Lien Waivers** button appears.
     * **Are specialty contractors notified about lien waivers?** Yes. To alert specialty contractors when one or more lien waivers are available to sign, Procore Pay sends an automated email notification to all designated invoice contacts on the commitment. See [Add Invoice Contacts to a Purchase Order or Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-contacts).
![Generate Lien Waivers Empty State](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/f813a3fe626d6643e14683c3f7424e5a/22d290ecfeb5209040a1b473a9f1f9d7/generate-lien-waivers-empty-state.png?fm=webp)


##  Next Steps 
  * [Regenerate Lien Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/regenerate-lien-waivers)
  * [Preview Lien Waivers on Subcontractor nvoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/preview-lien-waivers)
  * [Sign Lien Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-lien-waivers)
  * [View Signed Lien Waivers on Subcontractor Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-signed-lien-waivers-on-subcontractor-invoices)


## See Also
  * [When does Procore Pay send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-procore-pay-send-email-notifications)
  * [Regenerate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/regenerate-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)
  * [Manage Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/manage-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)


A _Lien Waiver_ is a document from a contractor, subcontractor, materials man, equipment lessor, or other party stating they have received the payment and waive any future _lien_ rights to the property.
title: Generate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices
description: How to generate lien waivers for a project invoice on a Procore Pay project.
